title: Guard Horn
description: Summon some guards to protect you
body:
**中文描述：**
本模组只有一个物品——警卫号角，获取方式可以通过获得“村庄英雄”效果后由农民，武器匠和盔甲匠这三个职业的村民赠予获得，或者可以通过8个绿宝石和一个山羊角合成获得。

本模组在玩家成功一次抵御袭击（即获得“村庄英雄”成就）后即可使用警卫号角，每三分钟即可召唤3个跟随你的警卫并获得无限时间的一级“村庄英雄”效果。

本模组有一个额外功能，僵尸和灾厄村民（包括掠夺兽和女巫）互相仇视。

本模组中警卫号角的冷却时间，召唤警卫的数量以及额外功能的开关均可以在配置文件修改。

**English description:**
This mod only has one item — the Guard Horn. Players can obtain it as a gift from villagers of the farmer, weaponsmith, and armorer professions after gaining the 'Village Hero' effect, or it can be crafted using 8 emeralds and a goat horn.

In this mod, after the player successfully repels an attack (i.e., earns the 'Hero of the Village' achievement), they can use the Guard Horn to summon 3 guards that follow you every three minutes and gain a level 1 'Hero of the Village' effect with unlimited duration.

This mod has an additional feature: zombies and illagers (ravagers and witches) are hostile to each other.

In this module, the cooldown time of the guard horn, the number of guards summoned, and the switches for additional functions can all be modified in the configuration file.

![用警卫号角召唤的警卫村民（“Guard Villagers”模组默认的警卫村民）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/254757fc7b81b3622b195537a0d84b73b4a530f4.png)
